subject: Re: West African Journal of Crop Research — submission window
body:
Dear Editorial Office,

Thank you for the details. We intend to submit our cassava biofortification manuscript ahead of the 16 October window. Could you confirm the maximum word count for original research articles?

Kind regards,
Layla McBride

subject: WAADA Year 2 narrative — section outline
body:
Dear Rebecca,

Draft outline for the Year 2 narrative: (1) field trial progress at Udi, (2) farmer engagement via ESFES workshops, (3) preliminary agronomic results, (4) variance from work plan. Will finalise once batch 3 stats are complete.

Layla

subject: Draft: Journal revision — cassava paper
body: Attaching the cleaned yield figures from block C. Convergence still an issue on variety random effect.

subject: Draft: WAADA Year 2 milestone report
body: The reviewers asked for the beta-carotene retention curves. I'll add them this week.

subject: Draft: Student supervision — thesis chapter
body: Milestone 2 is on track. Budget narrative and timeline drafted; need your sign-off.

subject: Draft: ESFES workshop logistics
body: Chapter 3 needs tighter methodology. Let's meet Tuesday after the lab session.

subject: Draft: Farmer cooperative registration list
body: Materials printed, registration open. Twilio reminders go out to the Udi corridor Friday.

subject: Draft: Conference abstract — Crop Science Dept
body: Full cooperative list updated in Airtable — 340 members, segmented by crop.

subject: Draft: Grant budget narrative
body: Abstract accepted for the October departmental conference. Poster draft in Figma.

subject: Draft: Field visit schedule Udi LGA
body: Direct flights only, morning departure, avoid Lagos connection if possible.

subject: Draft: Reference letter request
body: Parent meeting moved — can you take it? I have the Amina call at 3.

subject: Draft: Data sharing agreement — EACRI
body: Sharing the latest draft — comments in the margins, let's align before the deadline.

subject: Draft: Salary and pay slip query
body: Attaching the cleaned yield figures from block C. Convergence still an issue on variety random effect.

subject: Draft: Houston visit flights
body: The reviewers asked for the beta-carotene retention curves. I'll add them this week.

subject: Draft: Sophia's school parent meeting
body: Milestone 2 is on track. Budget narrative and timeline drafted; need your sign-off.

subject: Draft: Weekly family catch-up
body: Chapter 3 needs tighter methodology. Let's meet Tuesday after the lab session.
